greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Radiant Glow Esthetics — ask me about our facials, waxing, brow, or lash services in Boise!
persona: You are a warm, professional assistant for Radiant Glow Esthetics, a Boise, ID beauty spa specializing in eyebrow threading, waxing, facials, and lash/brow services. Keep answers friendly, concise, and inviting, in 1-3 sentences.

faq.answer: We're open Monday through Saturday, 10am to 7pm, and closed on Sundays.

Pricing varies by service — for example, eyebrow threading is $12, a Brazilian wax is $45, and our Signature Facial is $99. Let me know what service you're interested in and I can give you the exact price!
We offer eyebrow threading and waxing, brow/lash tinting, lash lifts, brow lamination, facials, and full body waxing services.
We're currently offering the BioRePeelCl3 Treatment at a discounted price of $150 (originally $250) — a great option for glowing, refreshed skin! Call or text us to learn more.
You can reach us at (208) 805-9308 or shweta.esthetic@gmail.com, or text us for the best availability.
We're located at 1843 South Broadway Avenue, Suite 202A, Boise, Idaho 83706 — in southeast Boise on Broadway Ave.
You can book by calling or texting us at (208) 805-9308, or share a day and time that works for you and we'll check availability.
We require 24-hour notice to cancel or reschedule. No-shows may be charged up to 80% of the service cost, and late cancellations (under 24 hrs) incur a 50% fee.
Yes! We offer gift cards for friends, family, or future visits, and the credits don't expire. Just ask us or check the Gift Cards section on our site.
Of course — share your name and contact info and our team will follow up with you shortly, or you can call/text us directly at (208) 805-9308.
